sentences.target: On reprend le dialogue après la réunion.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ʁə.pʁɑ̃ lə dja.lɔg a.pʁɛ la ʁe.y.njɔ̃/

translations.fr: On reprend le dialogue après la réunion.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ʁə.pʁɑ̃ lə dja.lɔg a.pʁɛ la ʁe.y.njɔ̃/
translations.en: We’ll resume the dialogue after the meeting.
translations.es: Reanudaremos el diálogo después de la reunión.
translations.de: Wir setzen den Dialog nach der Besprechung fort.
translations.it: Riprenderemo il dialogo dopo la riunione.
translations.zh-Hans: 会议结束后我们将继续对话。
translations.yue: 開完會之後我哋會繼續傾。
translations.pt: Retomaremos o diálogo após a reunião.
translations.vi: Chúng ta sẽ tiếp tục đối thoại sau cuộc họp.
translations.nl: We hervatten de dialoog na de vergadering.
translations.hu: A megbeszélés után folytatjuk a párbeszédet.
translations.hi: बैठक के बाद हम बातचीत फिर से शुरू करेंगे.
translations.el: Θα συνεχίσουμε τον διάλογο μετά τη συνάντηση.
translations.id: Kami akan melanjutkan dialog setelah rapat.
translations.ja: 会議後に対話を再開します。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (indefinite/colloquial 'we'); triggers 3rd person singular verb agreement.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; denotes resuming/continuing the action.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines the noun 'dialogue'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'reprend'.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determines 'réunion'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'après'.

translations.en: This dialogue seems useful to me.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个对话对我来说很有用。
translations.yue: 呢個對話對我嚟講好有用。
translations.vi: Cuộc đối thoại này có vẻ hữu ích với tôi.
translations.hu: Ez a párbeszéd számomra hasznosnak tűnik.
translations.hi: यह बातचीत मुझे उपयोगी लगती है.
translations.pl: Ten dialog wydaje mi się przydatny.
translations.el: Αυτός ο διάλογος μου φαίνεται χρήσιμος.
translations.nb: Denne dialogen virker nyttig for meg.
translations.id: Dialog ini tampak bermanfaat bagi saya.
translations.sv: Den här dialogen känns nyttig för mig.
translations.ro: Acest dialog mi se pare util.
translations.cs: Tento dialog se mi zdá užitečný.
translations.da: Denne dialog virker nyttig for mig.
translations.ja: この対話は私には有益に思えます。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'dialogue'.
Common noun, masculine singular; grammatical subject of the clause.
Clitic pronoun, 1st person singular (indirect object/experiencer) placed before the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; links subject to a predicate complement.
Adjective serving as predicate complement of 'semble'.

sentences.target: Ils ouvrent un dialogue avec le voisin.
sentences.reading: /il zuvʁ œ̃ dja.lɔg a.vɛk lə vwa.zɛ̃/

translations.fr: Ils ouvrent un dialogue avec le voisin.
translations.ipa: /il zuvʁ œ̃ dja.lɔg a.vɛk lə vwa.zɛ̃/
translations.en: They open a dialogue with the neighbor.
translations.es: Entablan un diálogo con el vecino.
translations.de: Sie beginnen einen Dialog mit dem Nachbarn.
translations.it: Avviano un dialogo con il vicino.
translations.pt: Eles iniciam um diálogo com o vizinho.
translations.vi: Họ mở cuộc đối thoại với người hàng xóm.
translations.nl: Ze beginnen een dialoog met de buurman.
translations.hi: वे पड़ोसी से बातचीत शुरू करते हैं.
translations.el: Ξεκινούν έναν διάλογο με τον γείτονα.
translations.nb: De innleder en dialog med naboen.
translations.sv: De inleder en dialog med grannen.
translations.da: De indleder en dialog med naboen.
translations.ja: 彼らは近所の人と対話を始める。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person plural; default masculine; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; denotes performing the action.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces a non-specific noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'ouvrent'.
Preposition introducing a comitative complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines 'voisin'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'avec'.

sentences.target: Je propose un dialogue entre nos équipes.
sentences.reading: /ʒə pʁɔ.poz œ̃ dja.lɔg ɑ̃tʁ no ze.kip/

translations.fr: Je propose un dialogue entre nos équipes.
translations.ipa: /ʒə pʁɔ.poz œ̃ dja.lɔg ɑ̃tʁ no ze.kip/
translations.en: I suggest a dialogue between our teams.
translations.es: Propongo un diálogo entre nuestros equipos.
translations.de: Ich schlage einen Dialog zwischen unseren Teams vor.
translations.it: Propongo un dialogo tra i nostri team.
translations.zh-Hans: 我建议我们的团队开展对话。
translations.yue: 我建議我哋嘅團隊之間展開對話。
translations.ru: Я предлагаю диалог между нашими командами.
translations.pt: Eu proponho um diálogo entre nossas equipes.
translations.he: אני מציע דיאלוג בין הצוותים שלנו.
translations.vi: Tôi đề xuất một cuộc đối thoại giữa các nhóm của chúng ta.
translations.nl: Ik stel een dialoog tussen onze teams voor.
translations.uk: Я пропоную діалог між нашими командами.
translations.hi: मैं हमारी टीमों के बीच संवाद का प्रस्ताव रखता हूँ.
translations.el: Προτείνω έναν διάλογο μεταξύ των ομάδων μας.
translations.nb: Jeg foreslår en dialog mellom teamene våre.
translations.id: Saya mengusulkan dialog antara tim-tim kami.
translations.sv: Jag föreslår en dialog mellan våra team.
translations.ro: Propun un dialog între echipele noastre.
translations.da: Jeg foreslår en dialog mellem vores teams.
translations.ja: 私たちのチーム間の対話を提案します。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; expresses the act of proposing.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces the direct object.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'propose'.
Preposition introducing a relational complement.
Possessive determiner, 1st person plural, plural form; modifies 'équipes'.
Common noun, feminine plural; object of the preposition 'entre'.
